message:
fix(btree): replace expect() panic with graceful error and free overflow chain on balance failure

Bug 1: In delete()'s interior-node rebalance path, cursor.stack.last()
used .expect() which would panic on a corrupt database. Every other
stack access in the same function returns a proper FrankenError. Replace
with .ok_or_else() for consistency and crash safety.

Bug 2: In replace_interior_cell(), when a new cell has overflow pages
and balance_for_insert() fails, those overflow pages were leaked. Apply
the same cleanup pattern used by table_insert_from_current_position and
index_insert: capture the overflow head before balance, free on failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
